children.heading: General purchase authority
children.label: a General purchase authority
children.text: Of the funds made available under , for fiscal year 2002 and each subsequent fiscal year, the Secretary of Agriculture shall use not less than $200,000,000 each fiscal year to purchase fruits, vegetables, and other specialty food crops.section 612c of this title

children.heading: Purchase of fresh fruits and vegetables for distribution to schools and service institutions
children.label: b Purchase of fresh fruits and vegetables for distribution to schools and service institutions
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall purchase fresh fruits and vegetables for distribution to schools and service institutions in accordance with using, of the amount specified in subsection (a), not less than $50,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023.section 1755(a) of title 42

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: c Definitions
children.text: In this section, the terms “fruits”, “vegetables”, and “other specialty food crops” shall have the meaning given the terms by the Secretary of Agriculture.
